summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy continues: Nexthop AI, Rhoda AI, and Mind Robotics each pulled in nine-figure Series rounds this month, while chip designers SiFive and Frore Systems secured $400M and $143M respectively. This week, Redwood City's Zūm — a school-bus fleet management platform — added $100M from TPG's Rise Fund at a ~$1.7B valuation. Most of the region's workforce is hiring or holding steady, though a few are tightening belts.
